description: Style NoteMatch spring's preppy outfits with this lucera ring for an old world charm - its designed to subtly blend in and class up your ensemble. One of fine jewellery's best creations, we love that this ring doesn't steal the show, yet its delicate sculpture doesn't escape notice. We recommend wearing this with tonal jewellery, keep the bangles/bracelets to a minimum for maximum effect.Product DetailsSlim silver band with alternating stone insets and upraised silver arcsMaterial and CareSilver, CZ diamondsWipe with a cotton swab to remove dust
